title: IT Support Specialist
description: Palo Alto Networks is seeking an IT Support Specialist in Nashville to provide technical support to employees. You'll work hybrid, troubleshooting hardware, software, and network issues while learning cutting-edge cybersecurity technologies. Start your IT career with a world-leading security company.
responsibilities: Provide technical support via helpdesk ticket system and phone for employee issues
Troubleshoot hardware, software, and network connectivity problems
Deploy and manage endpoint devices and ensure compliance with security policies
Maintain IT asset inventory and manage hardware lifecycle
Install software updates and security patches across the organization
Escalate complex issues to senior IT staff and document resolutions

requirements.education: High School diploma or GED; IT certification or college coursework preferred
skills: Knowledge of Windows and macOS operating systems
Experience with ticketing systems and IT support tools
Ability to work in a hybrid environment
certifications: CompTIA A+ or equivalent (preferred within 12 months)
